seo.title: Complete Order | {{siteName}}
seo.description: Complete your order at the {{siteName}} private club. Confirm your details and delivery method.

accessDenied.title: Log in to complete your order
accessDenied.reason: You need an account to complete your withdrawal request.
accessDenied.description: Your benefit selection will be saved. Log in or create an account to continue.

emptyCart.title: Your selection is empty
emptyCart.description: You have no benefits added to your selection. Explore our catalog and find what you need.

restrictedProducts.title: Benefits not available for your membership
restrictedProducts.description: Your current membership ({{icon}} {{name}}) does not have access to some benefits in your selection.

contact.title: Contact information
contact.fieldsAutoSave: Fields you complete will be automatically saved to your profile.
contact.name: First name
contact.documentReason: , we need your ID for this and future orders. You will only be asked once and you can view it in your profile.

shipping.title: Shipping address
shipping.noAddresses: You don't have any registered addresses yet. Add one to continue.
shipping.loginRequired: You need to log in and add an address to continue.

shippingOptions.title: Shipping options
shippingOptions.premiumPaymentNotice: Priority shipments require advance payment to guarantee delivery.

payment.cannotProcess: Payment cannot be processed at this time
payment.paymentPending: Payment in progress. Completing your order...
payment.paymentPendingNoOrder: Your payment is being verified. We will notify you when it is confirmed and your order will be created automatically.
payment.paymentPendingWithOrder: Your payment is being verified by the financial institution. Your order has been created and will be updated automatically once payment is confirmed.
payment.paymentConfirmed: Your card payment has been confirmed! Your order status has been updated.
payment.pendingDescription: Your payment was submitted and is being verified by the financial institution. Once confirmed, your order will be created automatically. No further action is needed.
payment.paymentDeclined: Payment was declined. Please try with another card.
payment.paymentError: Payment could not be processed. Please try again.
payment.acceptDeclaration: I accept and confirm this declaration
payment.paidWithCoinsDesc: Your order is 100% covered with your Virtual Coins
payment.cardSecureDesc: Pay securely with your credit or debit card. Payment is processed by Wompi.
payment.cardFeeNotice: Card payment includes an additional {{fee}}% charge for processing costs.
payment.bankTransferDesc: Make your contribution through Bre-B, Colombia's new instant payment system. Use the order number as reference. Your order will not be processed until the receipt has been sent to our Telegram.
payment.bankTransferChoose: Choose how to make your transfer:
payment.bankAvailability: Available in all Colombian banking apps (Bancolombia, BBVA, Davivienda, etc.)
payment.cashDesc: Pay in cash at the time of delivery. Make sure you have the exact amount available.
payment.cashNotice: By paying in cash, you will be acquiring Virtual Coins, our internal currency used for club management and its benefits. Your voluntary contribution allows us to maintain and improve services for all members.
payment.premiumShippingRestriction: You selected priority shipping. This type of shipping requires advance payment, so cash payment is not available.
